---
title: "10.1 Practical Project Exercises"
---

The directories under `exercises/` contain larger agentic-coding exercises in the repository. They may use Python or another language when that is appropriate for the project.

- `exercises/ising_mcmc/`
- `exercises/tight_binding_dos/`

These exercises are not meant to replace the basic chapters. They are larger practice tasks for applying the workflow:

1. design before coding,
2. implement in small pieces,
3. save inspectable data,
4. test deterministic parts,
5. validate numerical results,
6. review AI-agent diffs.
